data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an 'Auto-generated call link or phone instructions', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. While the linked use case mentions that customers receive a meeting link after booking, there is no direct evidence from API reads or persisted state checks that explicitly verifies the existence of this functionality. The lack of concrete evidence leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence of an auto-generated call link or phone instructions in the system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
